Calculation.Text: /* -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Returns a list with value at position 'index' removed Syntax: DeleteValue ( valuelist ; index ) In: list - the return delimited list to search index - the position (1-...) of the value to delete Return type: Text (a list with leading and trailing returns removed) DeleteValue ( "John¶Paul¶Brian¶George¶Ringo" ; 3 ) --> "John¶Paul¶George¶Ringo" Theo Ros -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- */ Let ( [ valuelist = LeftWords ( valuelist ; 999999999 ) ; totalvalues = ValueCount ( valuelist ) ] ; Case ( index < 1 Or index > totalvalues ; valuelist ; LeftWords ( LeftValues ( valuelist ; index - 1 ) & MiddleValues ( valuelist ; index + 1 ; 999999999 ) ; 999999999 ) ) )
